title: HOMESHOPA 12" Wooden Broom Head Natural Soft Coco Bristle, Replacement Broom Head, Indoor Outdoor Floor Sweeping Brush, Fitted Fixing Bracket Connector
features: Nature's Cleaning Power: Experience the gentle yet powerful touch of nature with our Soft Coco Bristle Broom. Crafted from premium coco fibers, this eco-friendly broom head with long wooden handled offers a soft touch that's perfect for indoor and outdoor use. Sweep away dust, dirt, and debris with ease, leaving your floors and outdoor spaces sparkling clean and beautifully maintained.

Soft Coco Bristle: Crafted from natural coco fiber bristles, our sweeping broom effortlessly collects both large debris and fine particles. Its soft bristles efficiently gather messes without scattering, ensuring thorough cleaning. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor sweeping, our heavy duty soft bristle brush is your versatile cleaning companion.

Replacement Wooden Head: 12" 290mm wide wooden broom head, complete with a robust coloured plastic bracket slot designed specifically for a 23.5mm radius pole handle stick. This innovative design features a convenient connector bracket for effortless attachment to your broom handle, ensuring easy installation and secure fastening.

Long-lasting Performance: Invest in quality that lasts. Our heavy duty replacement soft bristles broom head built to withstand years of heavy-duty use, ensuring your broom remains a reliable cleaning companion for years to come. Say goodbye to frequent replacements and hello to long-lasting cleaning power.

Versatile Usage: Our indoor and outdoor cleaning broom can be used on most floor surfaces including wood, linoleum, tile, concrete and cement. Ideal for home, kitchen and outdoor rough surface, patios, sidewalks, driveways and industrial spaces, shops, garages, porch and warehouse.
